name: healthcare_recall_notice_arrives_southport_rig_utl
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare recall notice arrives southport rig utl. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 20 minutes. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as rights vs utility under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Hector Nowak
agents.identity: I am Hector Nowak, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays utility for rights.

agents.name: Mateo Okoye
agents.identity: I am Mateo Okoye, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so utility isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of rights.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect utility.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 20 minutes. Evidence is partial. Hector Nowak must decide under rights vs utility. What does Hector Nowak do?
